findings.location: s1 — 個別項目と共通項目の区別
findings.description: The knowledge file states common items (共通項目) are「出力日時、起動プロセスID、処理方式区分」but omits 付加情報. According to the source, individual items (個別項目) run from リクエストID through 空きメモリ量(開始時); 付加情報 appears after that range in the table and therefore falls under「残りの項目」= common items.
findings.source_evidence: 「HTTPアクセスログの個別項目は、リクエストID、ユーザID、URLから空きメモリ量(開始時)までとなる。残りの項目は、:ref:`Log_BasicLogFormatter` の設定で指定する共通項目となる。」— 付加情報 is the last row in the output-items table, positioned after 空きメモリ量(開始時).

findings.description: httpAccessLogFormatter.endFormat is absent from all section hints. It is the last format-string property defined in the configuration table (リクエスト処理終了時のログ出力フォーマット) and is important for users configuring end-of-request logging.
findings.source_evidence: Property table first column: 「httpAccessLogFormatter.endFormat — リクエスト処理終了時のログ出力に使用するフォーマット」. The corresponding *OutputEnabled property (httpAccessLogFormatter.endOutputEnabled) IS in s1 hints, but the format property itself is missing from every section's hint list.

findings.description: httpAccessLogFormatter.className is absent from all section hints despite being the first property in the configuration table and being the entry point for swapping the formatter implementation.
findings.source_evidence: Property table first column: 「httpAccessLogFormatter.className — HttpAccessLogFormatterクラスを差し替える場合に指定する。」
